reasoning: This workout targets Koren's limiter of poor lactate clearance and fatigue resistance, as observed by the 9.3% decline from 5-min to 20-min power. Given the extended rest from the last ride, we'll ease into intensity but focus on building Koren's ability to maintain higher power over longer durations. This session will mimic the demands of Alpine Loop's main climb, preparing for the race target watts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x 8 minutes over-unders (2 min at 242-256W, 1 min at 201-218W), 2 min easy spin between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
